fractionation method: isolation of extracellular vesicles (EVs) by size exclusion chromatography (SEC)
fragmentation method: isolated and fragmented by higher-energy collisional dissociation
instrument: sprayed into a QExactive HF mass spectrometer
ionization type: equipped with a nanoFlex ion source
labeling: labeled with a tandem mass tag (1 µL reagent per sample)
